fix_summary: Generated C no longer expands large SPK packages into giant C byte arrays by default. It copies the SPK as a binary asset, compiles a small wrapper, verifies the file checksum, and loads it through spkv2_load_file.
reason_for_previous_failure: The old codegen emitted a 94MB ResNet50 SPK as a 603MB C initializer. MSVC exhausted compiler heap while compiling that single source file and reported C1060.
limitation: Generated wrappers still do not expose fault event controls or reliability stats; batch fault-injection evaluation remains on runtime CLI/ctypes.
